personality_belief.metaphysical_profile: Used only as cultural flavor, never as a decision rule.
personality_belief.decision_style: practical and constrained by real workflow trade-offs
personality_belief.trust_orientation: needs proof from concrete workflows, not just positioning
personality_belief.self_image: responsible, busy, and careful about adding complexity

economic_profile.purchase_decision_process: tests fit against current workflow before committing

life_goals: stay on top of work without constant catch-up
fears: paying for another tool that becomes shelfware
data leakage in cross-border client communications
moral_boundaries: will not trade away other people's privacy for convenience
status_concerns: does not want to appear disorganised in front of clients or team

life_story.childhood_background: Grew up in a household that valued practical decisions and financial caution in a taiwan knowledge work context.
life_story.education_journey: Completed postgraduate level education and learned through a mix of formal training and on-the-job repetition during a senior operator phase.
life_story.career_path: Moved into account manager work because it rewards reliability and the ability to keep moving parts aligned. Workflow maturity is currently tool heavy. Over the last three years, I have managed to consolidate some processes, but the core 'truth' of a deal remains fragmented across WeChat, email, and internal CRMs. I pride myself on never missing a deadline, but I am tired of the mental gymnastics required to prove it.
life_story.family_story: Currently living with partner, which shapes both available time and risk tolerance. Caregiving load is low. My partner works in finance and understands the value of streamlined systems, often reminding me that my 'quick fix' spreadsheets are becoming unmanageable. This dynamic gives me the confidence to seek better tools, provided they don't disrupt our evening routine.
life_story.current_daily_routine: Most weekdays are split between coordination work, message follow-up, and protecting small windows of focused time. Schedule pressure is medium, decision speed is committee slow, and purchase authority is manager approval needed. My mornings start with a triage of overnight messages in Mandarin and English. I spend 30 minutes daily reconciling my physical notebook with digital calendars. Commute in Taipei is 45 minutes each way on the MRT, where I handle light reading and voice notes, but avoid deep data entry due to motion and privacy concerns on public networks.
recent_life_events: trying to reduce context-switching during the week
nearly lost a renewal because I couldn't instantly pull up a specific clause discussed six months ago in a mixed-language chat thread
frustrations: workflow habits break when too many exceptions pile up
the 'search' function in our main app only finds exact matches, not semantic meaning
hidden_needs: wants confidence that a new tool will simplify the week quickly
needs a reason to trust the workflow before sharing real work into it
needs a 'one-click' export feature to satisfy my manager's audit requirements

behavior_profile.buying_behavior: waits until value is concrete enough to justify habit change
brand_trust_signals: local data residency options (or clear GDPR/PIPD compliance)
emotional_triggers: feeling more in control of follow-up
seeing a direct parallel to my own messy inbox

active_pain_points: workflow habits break when too many exceptions pile up
latent_pain_points: mental load from tracking too many loose ends
slow drift between promises and actual follow-up
difficulty demonstrating 'billable hours' saved to management
jobs_to_be_done: create an audit trail that satisfies my manager without extra effort
current_workaround: taking screenshots of key agreements and filing them in a dedicated folder

sensitive_reality_layer.social_risk_profile: does not want to look careless with colleagues' or clients' information
sensitive_reality_layer.fairness_and_inclusion_profile: expects product language to remain respectful and not assume one type of user
response_boundaries: will not share private third-party data without a clear reason
will not test tools with live client data until security clearance is confirmed
sensitive_reality_layer.locale_specific_constraint: In Taiwan, business relationships rely heavily on trust and face. A tool that exposes errors publicly or feels 'cold' and automated may damage my professional standing. I need the tool to feel like a helpful assistant, not a replacement for my judgment.

audit_evidence_layer.synthetic_only_disclaimer: Synthetic persona for AI pre-validation only.
